original_image_tags: A manila file folder, oriented vertically. The folder is empty and shows no printed text, stamps, or labels. At the top right, a handwritten file reference is written in pencil or light ink, with the final digit in red ink. The folder has three hole-punch marks: one centered at the top and two at the bottom. The folder appears to be from a standard government filing system.

elements.description: One manila folder or envelope back. The surface is blank except for three hole-punch marks (one at the top, two at the bottom). There is handwritten text in the upper right corner reading '62-83894-9', with the final digit written in red ink.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the same core visual content: a manila folder with three hole-punch marks (one top, two bottom) and handwritten text in the upper right corner with the final digit in red ink.
